js.home: const cate=env.get("category");const page=env.get("page");if(cate=="/"){const html=await(0,utils_1.req)(env.baseUrl);const $=utils_1.kitty.load(html);const items=[];$("#index article").each(function(){const a=$(this).find("a");const id=a.attr("href");if(!id)return;let cover=$(this).find(".blog-background").css("background-image");if(cover){const match=cover.match(/url\(["']?([^"')]+)["']?\)/);cover=match?match[1]:"";}const title=$(this).find(".post-card-title").text().trim();const remark=$(this).find(".post-card-info span:last").text().trim();items.push({id,cover,title,remark});});return items;}const url=`${env.baseUrl}${cate}page/${page}/`;const html=await(0,utils_1.req)(url);const $=utils_1.kitty.load(html);const items=[];$("#index article").each(function(){const a=$(this).find("a");const id=a.attr("href");if(!id)return;let cover=$(this).find(".blog-background").css("background-image");if(cover){const match=cover.match(/url\(["']?([^"')]+)["']?\)/);cover=match?match[1]:"";}const title=$(this).find(".post-card-title").text().trim();const remark=$(this).find(".post-card-info span:last").text().trim();items.push({id,cover,title,remark});});return items;
js.detail: const id=env.get("movieId");const url=`${env.baseUrl}${id}`;const html=await(0,utils_1.req)(url);const $=utils_1.kitty.load(html);const title=$("h1.post-title").text().trim();const cover=$("meta[property='og:image']").attr("content")??"";const desc=$(".post-content p").first().text().trim().substring(0,200);let videos=[];const dplayer=$(".dplayer");if(dplayer.length>0){const configStr=dplayer.attr("data-config");if(configStr){try{let cleanStr=configStr.replace(/"/g,'"');const config=JSON.parse(cleanStr);let videoUrl=config?.video?.url;if(videoUrl){videoUrl=videoUrl.replace(/\\\//g,'/');videos.push({text:"播放",url:videoUrl});}}catch(e){console.log("解析失败:"+e);}}}return{id,title,cover,desc,playlist:[{title:"默认",videos}]};
js.search: const wd=env.get("keyword");const page=env.get("page");const url=`${env.baseUrl}/search/${encodeURIComponent(wd)}/page/${page}/`;try{const html=await(0,utils_1.req)(url);const $=utils_1.kitty.load(html);const items=[];$("#index article").each(function(){const a=$(this).find("a");const id=a.attr("href");if(!id)return;let cover=$(this).find(".blog-background").css("background-image");if(cover){const match=cover.match(/url\(["']?([^"')]+)["']?\)/);cover=match?match[1]:"";}const title=$(this).find(".post-card-title").text().trim();items.push({id,cover,title,remark:""});});return items;}catch(e){return[]}
